title: War
subTitle: Kabir, a secret agent, goes rogue after a mission to catch a terrorist goes awry. However, his boss sends Khalid, another agent and his student, to track him down.

title: Mahaan
subTitle: A lawyer goes into hiding after being falsely accused of committing a crime, while his wife gives birth to twins. Years later, fate reunites the family under difficult circumstances.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Dariya Dil
subTitle: Scolded by his family for being a miser, wealthy industrialist Dhaniram loves money. However, his two sons, Ajay and Vijay, are manipulated by their wives and despise their father, looking for ways to entrap him. Soon, he gets into a clash with a tax officer and the officer's siblings devise an evil plot to plunder the businessman's fortune.

title: Ganga Ki Saugand
subTitle: Thakur Jaswant Singh, a tyrannical village landlord, assaults Jeeva's mother and has him thrown out of the village. Jeeva returns as a dacoit in order to take revenge.

title: Izzatdaar
subTitle: When Brahm Dutt, a wealthy businessman, is falsely convicted on murder charges, he enlists the help of a boy to exact revenge on Indrajeet, his cruel son-in-law and the cause of all his miseries.

title: Bewaffa Se Waffa
subTitle: Rukhsar asks her best friend Nagma to marry her husband, Aslam, and mother a child for him when she is unable to do it herself. However, problems begin when Nagma's relatives cause discord among them.

title: Taarzan: The Wonder Car
subTitle: Raj revamps his deceased father's car into a wonderful car named Taarzan and the car comes alive as it is possessed by his father's spirit. Soon, it also starts killing his father's murderers.

title: Karz Chukana Hai
subTitle: After losing his job owing to his arrogance and subsequently his son, Vijay, Atmaram realises his mistake and decides to turn over a new leaf.

title: Karz Chukana Hai
subTitle: After losing his job owing to his arrogance and subsequently his son, Vijay, Atmaram realises his mistake and decides to turn over a new leaf.

title: Nayee Padosan
subTitle: Three men try different methods to woo their neighbour. However, her father wants her to get married to someone from his community.

title: Bhumika: The Role
subTitle: Urvashi who becomes an actress with the help of Keshav, ends up marrying him. However, things complicate when she indulges in affairs with prominent men in the film industry.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Aaj Ka Daur
subTitle: A landlord offers an unemployed young man a position that requires him to evict people living in his building who do not pay rent on time.

title: Khal-Naaikaa
subTitle: A pregnant woman's life turns into a nightmare after her husband commits suicide and she loses her unborn child. Embittered, the woman embarks on a quest for revenge.

title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
subTitle: M S Dhoni, a boy from Ranchi, aspires to play cricket for India. Though he initially tries to please his father by working for the Indian Railways, he ultimately decides to chase his dreams.

title: Jamai Raja
subTitle: When the wealthy Durgeshwari's daughter falls in love with Raja, a poor boy, she reluctantly agrees to their union. However, she constantly tries to sabotage their relationship, but Raja outwits her.

title: Yeshwant
subTitle: Yeshwant, an honest police inspector, is framed and arrested for a murder. However, after being released from prison, he learns that his wife is having an affair.

title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
subTitle: Friends Gopal, Lucky, Madhav and Laxman often dupe gullible people out of their money. Hilarity ensues when they target a middle-aged couple and simultaneously try wooing their beautiful neighbour.

title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
subTitle: Friends Gopal, Lucky, Madhav and Laxman often dupe gullible people out of their money. Hilarity ensues when they target a middle-aged couple and simultaneously try wooing their beautiful neighbour.

title: Pyar Ka Saaya
subTitle: A murdered man returns as a ghost to warn his wife of the danger she is in. However, he is able to communicate only through a fortune-teller.

title: Takkar
subTitle: Ravi Malhotra, a photographer, is framed by a corrupt policeman, D'Costa, on the day before his wedding. While in jail, Ravi studies law to exact revenge against his perpetrator.

title: The Burning Train
subTitle: Vinod, a railway engineer, launches the Super Express, a dream project that is India's fastest passenger train. However, it goes out of control on its maiden journey due to a bomb planted by a rival.

title: Jeet
subTitle: Karan, a gangster, falls in love with Kajal, but she marries Raju because of her father's poor health. Later, when Raju finds out about his father's illegal business, Karan is hired to kill him.

title: Tango Charlie
subTitle: When the war breaks out between India and Pakistan, riots erupt in North India. Later, BSF trooper Tarun and his battalion are sent to Kargil, where they face a challenge that will decide his fate.

title: Devdas
subTitle: After his wealthy family prohibits him from marrying the woman he is in love with, Devdas's life spirals downward as he takes up alcohol and a life of vice to alleviate the pain.

title: Arjun Pandit
subTitle: A mild-mannered professor's world shatters after betrayal drives him into a violent transformation, where love and rage collide on the streets of Mumbai.

title: Amar Akbar Anthony
subTitle: Three brothers, each raised in different religious households, reunite after many years in a chance encounter. They set out to take revenge on those responsible for separating them.
